channel.title: Github-Pages on Ben's homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Github-Pages on Ben's homepage

item.title: Switching to "stack" theme.
item.description:
The paper theme is a bit blank, and I also don’t like their look on mobile. So I started looking around and I found Stack.

It has enough configuration to keep me busy for a while, but on first look, it’s not as complicated as some of the more crazy ones out there.

So how do I look?
